violations.description: HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): A hand drying device was noted not provided at the hand washing lavatory in the ware-washing area. Paper towels were replaced upon notification of violation. Critical violation corrected.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Bottom of the reach-in cooler containing milk noted not clean.
PREMISES (1 pts): Mop noted not hung.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Reach-in cooler interiors (sandwich cooler and milk coolers) and counter tops noted not clean.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors in the kitchen noted in need of cleaning. Wall by the garbage can noted in need of cleaning.
